1805870.name: RPG Maker VX Ace - Japanese School Girls Vol.7
1805870.description:
Have you been searching for the right voice for your young heroine? Then give Japanese School Girls Vol. 7 a listen! TK Projects’ latest sound effect pack is packed with more tracks performed by a voice actress to help bring your female characters to life in your games.

With 248 SE to choose from, there are plenty of places you could use this pack! Have a character’s younger sister give a happy “bye-bye!” when she heads off to school, or give a sweet character a high-pitch voice when she speaks. If your game includes a gift-giving mechanic, why not have your heroine voice her thanks for a thoughtful gift or her displeasure when you try to give her some trash? Find the perfect phrase for your scenes by checking the pack’s pdf file that lists each SE’s meaning.

And you’ll find more than just simple phrases in this pack, with a selection of breath SEs you can use to add a bit more emotion to your dialogue even when a pre-made phrase doesn’t fit.

This pack also includes the SEs in both OGG and M4A file formats, making it simple to use in your favorite engines. Add another layer to your characters with Japanese School Girls Vol. 7!

Features:

* 248 SE covering a wide variety of expressions
* OGG and M4A file formats included

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
1805870.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 意大利语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 日语
